#  Submittal Builder: Configure Submittal Titles 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Submittal Builder: Generate Submittals from Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/generate-submittal-log)
    * An [AI-powered Submittal Builder ](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/submittal-builder-with-ai-generate-submittals-from-specifications)is available in English to _Enhanced_ and _Premier_ Procore accounts in the United States, Canada, and Australia.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. Click **Items to Review**.
  3. Hover over the item you want to create and click ![Icon Daily Log Completed Day Checkmark](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e3fce80d6af0c3e1ae7a77273d2588fb/6a9a6b712b6de60e23ea53d4c02e1d84/icon-daily-log-completed-day-checkmark.png?fm=webp&h=15) **Review**.   
_Note:_ If you don't see the submittal item in the 'Items to review' window at the bottom of your screen, you may need to [generate the submittal](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/generate-submittal-log) first. Or, the item was already reviewed or deleted.
  4. Select a **Specification Section** to review.
  5. Click **Configure Title**.
  6. Mark the checkbox next to the options you want to use for the submittal titles.
  7. _Optional_ : Enter your own custom option and click **Add Title Option**. You can add multiple custom options, but they can only be added one at a time.
  8. Reorder the selected options and review the text under 'Preview Title Example'.  

![Configure](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/EhkZMagcy5Cy0msDy5aMX/237e7100e8e5c91844e25f39936cbda1/configure.png?fm=webp)
  9. Click **Apply to All Spec Sections** or **Apply to Current Spec Section**.  
_Notes:_
     * Applying the configured title will replace any existing titles on submittals not yet confirmed.
     * Changing the 'Type' of a submittal manually after configuring the titles will not automatically update the submittal's 'Title'.  

![Applied](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/137p1Nhm8JkC759pZdKsjI/8897ecffb648073ee2fc42b3f4d06197/applied.png?fm=webp)
  10. Click **Confirm** to create submittals from the current specification section 


##  Next Steps 
  1. Fill out the remaining information on your submittals:
     * Create and edit submittal packages (recommended). See [Create a Submittal Package](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/create-a-submittal-package) and [Bulk Edit Submittals in a Package](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/bulk-edit-submittals).  
OR
     * Bulk edit the submittals. See [Use Bulk Actions > Edit in the Submittals Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/use-bulk-actions-edit-in-the-submittals-tool).


## See Also
  * [Submittal Builder: Generate Submittals from Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/generate-submittal-log)
  * [Submittal Builder with AI: Generate Submittals from Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/submittal-builder-with-ai-generate-submittals-from-specifications)
  * [Best Practices: Submittal Builder](https://v2.support.procore.com/reference-best-practices-submittal-builder)
title: Submittal Builder: Configure Submittal Titles
description: How to configure your title structure for submittals.
